# X Long-Form Post (adapter)

Source skill: [`x-longform-post/`](../../../x-longform-post/) — see
[`x-longform-post/SKILL.md`](../../../x-longform-post/SKILL.md).

## When to use

- Drafting X articles or threads in a CEO/founder voice
- Final humanizer pass on any AI-generated post
- Adding ASCII diagrams or code-block visuals to a post

## Output

- Final post with humanizer score
- 24-pattern AI-slop diff showing what was rewritten
